name: Yorgo's Tabouli
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover bulghur with boiling water.
2. Cover and let sit about 30 minutes until all the water is absorbed.
3. Add salt, parsley, green onions (and/or scallions), garlic, lemon juice, and olive oil.
4. Stir in chopped tomatoes and garbanzos.
5. Top with a quarter cup of feta cheese.
Vicki's notes:
Bulghur is cracked wheat. You can find it at health-food stores or some grocery stores near grains and pasta.
Scallions can replace part of the green onions. Some people prefer to use mint instead of (or in addition to) parsley, which may require adding chopped cucumber instead of tomatoes and sliced avocado.
